summary: W877 packages one W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch record plus WPP limit/colimit stability as canonical direct-localization stable-boundary inputs. It derives direct bounded left calculus through W876, the W657 direct-localization source core through W722, and finite-shape transfer through the W719 bridge. This removes separate direct-localization boundary inputs but does not construct a nullary original four-task positive witness.
obligations_discharged: W735/W876 direct bounded left calculus is now packaged into direct-localization stable-boundary inputs.
W735/W722 source-triangulation data is now packaged as the W657 direct-localization source core.
W735/W719 normalized fixed-target data plus WPP limit/colimit stability is now packaged as finite-shape transfer inputs.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: Separate direct bounded left calculus input for the direct-localization boundary.
Separate W657 direct-localization triangulated source core input.
Separate finite-shape transfer input once WPP limit and colimit stability are supplied.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
OriginalFourTaskProductData still requires caller-supplied bounded-derived stable data, W852 route data, or W961 closed-embedding closedness field data; no nullary product witness exists.
The W877 bridge consumes a caller-supplied W735 branch record and caller-supplied WalkingParallelPair limit and colimit stability; it does not construct those values from nothing.
A concrete nullary MetrizableWppNormalizedFixedTargetDataProviderW719 value is still not available.
A concrete nullary MetrizableWppBoundaryRelationTargetClosednessNormalizedDataProviderW732 value is still not constructible from current source.
A concrete nullary W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch record is still not constructible from current source.
Concrete nullary WPP limit and colimit stability for WalkingParallelPair are still not constructed.
A concrete ClosedEmbeddingClosednessFieldsInputW961 value is still not constructible from current source.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide Pretriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA) or IsTriangulated (BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA).
remaining_work: Construct concrete nullary W719 normalized fixed-target data, W732 route-data, or W735 branch data.
Construct WPP WalkingParallelPair limit and colimit stability or a stronger route that eliminates those inputs.
Use concrete source data plus direct-left-calculus and source-triangulation evidence to build a nullary bounded-derived stable package.
Assemble and audit the final original four-task positive witness.
Build the Tier C review packet and only then permit update_goal complete.
